summary: Tested commission type display (Historical/Balance), AI-powered duplicate detection via OpenRouter, and Exit Trade functionality. All 18 backend tests PASSED. UI verification confirmed Commission Records shows Type column with Historical (amber) and Balance (green) badges. AI duplicate detection working with ai_powered=true. Trade Monitor shows complete trade history with lot_size, direction, actual_profit, commission, and performance columns.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed commission entries with both skip_deposit=true and skip_deposit=false
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission Records Dialog accessible via Profit Tracker > Access Records > Commission Records. Type column shows 'Historical' (amber/skip_deposit=true) and 'Balance' (green/skip_deposit=false). AI duplicate check endpoint POST /api/forum/ai-check-duplicate returns ai_powered=true when OpenRouter API works. Trade logging via POST /api/trade/log stores commission field. GET /api/trade/history returns paginated results with commission field.

commission_type_display.test: Returns skip_deposit field to differentiate Historical vs Balance
commission_type_display.ui_verification: Commission Records Dialog shows TYPE column with Historical (amber) and Balance (green) badges

ai_duplicate_detection.test: Returns results, has_similar, and ai_powered fields
ai_duplicate_detection.ui_verification: Forum New Post shows 'Similar existing posts' dropdown while typing

ai_fallback_to_regex.test: Falls back to regex if OpenRouter fails, returns ai_powered=false
ai_fallback_to_regex.result: PASS (informational - OpenRouter was working during tests)

exit_trade_log.test: Creates trade with lot_size, direction, actual_profit, commission, performance

data_verified.direction: Uses signal direction as source of truth

trade_history.test: Returns paginated results with all trade fields

trade_performance_calculation.logic: perfect = diff < 0.01, exceeded = actual > projected, below = actual < projected

profit_tracker_commission_records.path: Profit Tracker > Access Records > Commission Records

verified: Similar existing posts dropdown appears while typing
Trade History table with columns: Day, Date, Product, Direction, LOT Size, Projected, Actual, P/L Diff, Actions

openrouter_integration.test_result: AI duplicate detection returned ai_powered=true for all test queries
